# Maleficium Tattoo

Maleficium Tattoo is a professional tattoo studio based in Vilanova i la Geltrú, Barcelona, Spain.

We specialize in high-quality custom tattoos, including blackwork, realism, and fine line styles.

Our focus is on artistic excellence, hygiene, and personalized designs for each client.

## Website Structure

- Home: https://maleficiumtattoo.com/
- Studio: https://maleficiumtattoo.com/de/studio
- Artists: https://maleficiumtattoo.com/de/artists
- Gallery: https://maleficiumtattoo.com/de/gallery
- Contact: https://maleficiumtattoo.com/de/contact
- Blog: https://maleficiumtattoo.com/de/blog
- Merch: https://maleficiumtattoo.com/de/merch

## Artists

- Alexis: https://maleficiumtattoo.com/de/artists/alexis
- Manu: https://maleficiumtattoo.com/de/artists/manu

## Languages

The website is available in:
- English (EN)
- Spanish (ES)
- German (DE)

## Location

Sankt Pölten, Austria

## Booking

Appointments are available via contact form or social media.
